name: Chicken Stir-Fry with Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove chicken meat from bones and shred into 1-inch long pieces. You should have about 2 cups.
2. Cook pasta in boiling water until al dente, following package directions.
3. In a medium bowl, whisk together egg whites, 3 tablespoons cornstarch, and garlic. Add shredded chicken; toss to coat. Let stand for 5 minutes.
4. In another small bowl, mix the remaining 2 tablespoons cornstarch with some water. Stir in the remaining water, vinegar, soy sauce, and red pepper flakes.
5. Heat peanut oil in a large wok or heavy skillet over medium-high heat until it begins to sizzle.
6. Lift chicken pieces from the egg white mixture, letting excess drip back into the bowl. Stir-fry until golden, about 5 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon and place on paper towels. Wipe out the wok or skillet.
7. Return the wok to medium heat. Whisk the reserved cornstarch/soy mixture again and pour it into the hot wok. Bring to a boil.
8. Add mushrooms and onions, stirring constantly until the sauce thickens. Add cooked chicken pieces and continue heating, stirring constantly, until the chicken and vegetables are glistening and the mixture is hot.
9. Drain pasta and place on a serving platter. Top with the chicken/vegetable mixture.
